untranslatable_reason: This signal requires pattern recognition (head-and-shoulders detection with neckline and shoulder points A, B, C, D, E) and temporal ratio validation between pattern formation points. The allowed indicator set contains only price-derived technical indicators and does not include pattern detection, geometric point identification, or explicit time-ratio comparisons between named pattern components. The core logic 'time(E to penetration) ≤ 2.0x time(A to E)' requires tracking specific pattern landmarks that cannot be expressed with standard OHLCV indicators.
translation_notes: Signal requires candlestick pattern recognition engine with point-in-time tracking. Exit condition based on neckline penetration translated to pivot-based reversal as proxy. Parameters max_penetration_time_ratio=2.0 and reference_period='A_to_E_duration' cannot be operationalized without pattern detection module. Recommend implementing dedicated head-and-shoulders pattern scanner with temporal validation before using this signal in backtest.
